clauses.name: Mutuality
clauses.requirement: The NDA must bind both parties symmetrically as disclosing and receiving parties.

clauses.name: Confidential Information
clauses.requirement: Confidential Information must be broad and must not include extra exclusions beyond the standard carve-outs.

clauses.name: Governing Law
clauses.requirement: Governing law must be India, Delaware, England and Wales, or DIFC.

clauses.name: Term and Survival
clauses.requirement: The NDA term and ordinary confidentiality survival must be fixed at up to five years, with carve-outs for trade secrets and personal data.

clauses.name: Non-Circumvention
clauses.requirement: The NDA must not include non-circumvention, introduced-party non-solicit, or substitute-purpose exclusivity obligations.

clauses.name: Signatures
clauses.requirement: The execution block must show both parties, signatory titles, and a date.
